zh.lifeSummary: 當Adenolfo III d'Aquino於大約1206年出生在義大利拉其福洛希農洛凱瑟卡卡斯特洛時，他的父親Landolfo d'Aquino15歲，母親Theodora Gallucio d'Inverno17歲。他於1225年與Gubitosa di Lorito在義大利馬安科納洛雷托結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1242年在義大利坎帕尼亞拿坡里拿坡里享年38歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adenolfo III d'Aquino于大约1206年出生在意大利拉其福洛希農洛凱瑟卡卡斯特洛时，他的父亲Landolfo d'Aquino15岁，母亲Theodora Gallucio d'Inverno17岁。他于1225年与Gubitosa di Lorito在意大利馬安科納洛雷托结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1242年在意大利坎帕尼亞拿坡里拿坡里享年38岁。

nameMeanings.name: d'Aquino
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Nicola, Stefano, Gaetano, Margherita, Nunzio, Sal, Salvatore.  Spanish Alba, Jose Alejandro, Pedro, Socorro.

Italian: habitational name for someone from a place called Aquino, of which there are several examples in Italy, but in particular the one in Lazio, birthplace of Saint Thomas Aquinas (see   Aquino  ).

variants.name: Aquino
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Antonio, Pedro, Juan, Manuel, Mario, Ana, Jesus, Jorge, Josefina, Julio, Luis.  Portuguese Paulo, Catarina, Joao.  Italian Romeo, Luigi, Salvatore, Clemente, Leonardo.

Italian, Spanish, and Portuguese: from a Christian personal name bestowed in honor of Saint Thomas Aquinas (1225–74; Tommaso d'Aquino in Italian, Tomás de Aquino in Spanish), an Italian Dominican friar and Doctor of the Church. This surname is also common in the Philippines. See also 2 below, compare De Aquino .
Italian: habitational name from a place called Aquino (see   D'Aquino  ), the place where the theologian (see 1 above) was born.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Adenolfo III d'Aquino was born about 1206, in Castello, Roccasecca, Frosinone, Lazio, Italy, his father, Landolfo d'Aquino, was 15 and his mother, Theodora Gallucio d'Inverno, was 17. He married Gubitosa di Lorito in 1225, in Loreto, Ancona, Marche, Italy. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died about 1242, in Naples, Naples, Campania, Italy, at the age of 38.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adenolfo III d'Aquino est né environ 1206, à Castello, Roccasecca, Frosinone, Lazio, Italie, son père, Landolfo d'Aquino, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Theodora Gallucio d'Inverno, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Gubitosa di Lorito en 1225, à Loreto, Ancona, Marche, Italie. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé environ 1242, à Napoli, Napoli, Campania, Italie, à l’âge de 38 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adenolfo III d'Aquino um 1206 in Castello, Roccasecca, Frosinone, Lazio, Italien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Landolfo d'Aquino 15 und seine Mutter Theodora Gallucio d'Inverno 17. Er hat 1225 in Loreto, Ancona, Marche, Italien Gubitosa di Lorito geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb um 1242 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Neapel, Napoli, Campania, Italien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adenolfo III d'Aquino è nato il circa 1206 nel Castello, Roccasecca, Frosinone, Lazio, Italia, il suo padre, Landolfo d'Aquino, aveva 15 anni e il suo madre, Theodora Gallucio d'Inverno, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Gubitosa di Lorito nel 1225, nel Loreto, Ancona, Marche, Italia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì circa 1242, nel Napoli, Napoli, Campania, Italia, all'età di 38 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Adenolfo III d'Aquinoが約1206年にイタリアラズオフロシノンロクケイセクカカステロで生まれた時，父Landolfo d'Aquinoは15歳，母Theodora Gallucio d'Invernoは17歳であった。1225年にイタリアマルチェアンコナロアトーでGubitosa di Loritoと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は約1242年にイタリアカンプアニアナポリナポリで38歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adenolfo III d'Aquino(이)가 대략 1206년 이탈리아 라지오 프로시넌 록카세치아 카스텔로에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Landolfo d'Aquino(은)는 15세였고, 그의 어머니 Theodora Gallucio d'Inverno(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1225년 이탈리아 마체 앤코나 로레토에서 Gubitosa di Lorito(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1242년 이탈리아 캠파니아 나폴리 나폴리에서 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.circa 1206–circa 1242: tany ho any amin'ny 1206–tany ho any amin'ny 1242

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adenolfo III d'Aquino nasceu aproximadamente 1206, em Castello, Roccasecca, Frosinone, Lazio, Itália, seu pai, Landolfo d'Aquino, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Theodora Gallucio d'Inverno, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Gubitosa di Lorito em 1225, em Loreto, Ancona, Marche, Itália. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1242, em Napoli, Napoli, Campania, Itália, com 38 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adenolfo III d'Aquino родился около 1206 г. в местности кастеллоу, роккеисекка, фросиноун, лазио, Италия, его отцу по имени Landolfo d'Aquino было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Theodora Gallucio d'Inverno, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Gubitosa di Lorito в 1225 г. в местности лорето, анкона, марч, Италия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер около 1242 г. в местности наполи, наполи, кампаня, Италия в возрасте 38 лет.

sm.circa 1206–circa 1242: e tusa o le 1206–e tusa o le 1242

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adenolfo III d'Aquino nació aproximadamente 1206, en Castello, Roccasecca, Frosinone, Lazio, Italia, su papá, Landolfo d'Aquino, tenía 15 años y su mamá, Theodora Gallucio d'Inverno, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Gubitosa di Lorito en 1225, en Loreto, Ancona, Marche, Italia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 1242, en Napoli, Napoli, Campania, Italia, a la edad de 38 años.
